Ballistic Vest

Ballistic Vest

BALLISTIC VEST

Based upon the NIJ 0108.01 Standard, a complete ballistic vest is designed and developed using a variety of armour materials including composite back up and technical ceramics (boron carbide, silisium carbide and alümina) to be used by the security and defense forces against all kind of bullets including AP-Armour Piercing cores.
